name: Frere Jacques
notes: Traditional French children's song (also known as 'Brother John' or 'Are You Sleeping'). In key of C major. The melody follows the famous round pattern: 'Frere Jacques, Frere Jacques, Dormez-vous? Dormez-vous? Sonnez les matines, Sonnez les matines, Ding dang dong, Ding dang dong.' The fifth and sixth phrases use eighth notes for the bell-ringing motif. This is the complete traditional melody, perfect for teaching rounds to children.
